Venue Info
Media Gallery
Veterans United Home Loans Amphitheater at Virginia Beach
Virginia Beach, VA
Previous Names:
GTE Virginia Beach Amphitheater (Changed after 2000)
Verizon Wireless Virginia Beach Amphitheater (Changed after 2010)
Virginia Beach Amphitheater (Changed after 2011)
Farm Bureau Live at Virginia Beach (Changed after 2015)
Seating Capacity: 20000
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 23
  DMB  (23)

Longest Performance:
06.23.05 - Seek Up (23:48)
Venue Picture
Description
Verizon Wireless Amphitheter opened in 1996 as GTE Virginia Beach Amphitheater.

3550 Cellar Door Way
Virginia Beach, VA 23456
